name: Shipping Ops Pack
description: Prepare code for release with git hygiene, CI/CD automation, launch readiness, migrations, and durable documentation.
useCases: Prepare release-ready branches with clean commits, clear PR summaries, and scoped review evidence.
Set up or repair CI/CD quality gates so tests, builds, linting, and deployment checks reflect real release risk.
Plan launches with rollout steps, observability, rollback, owner follow-ups, and customer-facing documentation.
Manage migrations and deprecations with compatibility windows, communication plans, and durable ADRs.
examplePrompts: Prepare this branch for release: inspect git status, summarize changes, identify missing checks, and draft a PR description.
Review our CI/CD setup for this project and recommend the smallest quality gates needed before deployment.
Create a launch checklist for this feature with rollout, monitoring, rollback, documentation, owners, and post-launch follow-up.
Plan this migration or deprecation with compatibility risks, user communication, implementation phases, and an ADR outline.
